title: pilosella × flammea
intro: Pilosella × flammea, also known as a hybrid of the Rough Hawk's-beard and the Hoary Hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella × flammea include its ability to aid in the treatment of various skin issues, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its dried flowers and leaves can also be used as a natural remedy in the form of capsules or powders.
